reason: Pre-refactor snapshot before deleting all milestones (per user instruction 2026-05-18)

milestones.title: M1 - Foundation
milestones.description: The only platform where agents can build, find, and run skills in one place. API unification, e2e lifecycle, versioning, sandboxed execution.

milestones.title: M2 - Build Experience
milestones.description: Generate skills from nothing, or from any API spec. Dual-mode build, OpenAPI-to-skill, CLI/SDK.

milestones.title: M3 - Trust & Quality
milestones.description: The only registry where you know a skill is safe before running it. LLM-based audit, waiver system, analytics, reputation.

milestones.title: M4 - Platform Power
milestones.description: Skills that compose into workflows. Skill chaining, webhooks, templates, network effects.

milestones.title: M5 - Marketplace
milestones.description: Developers get paid for building skills. Usage billing, revenue share, org sharing, curation.

milestones.title: Refactor
milestones.description: API v1 standardization + architecture refactor — tracks Epic 0 through Epic 4 (issue #64).

milestones.title: Go Live Preparation
milestones.description: Pre-launch foundations: per-user quota system + admin model selection. Targeting Friday 2026-05-08.

milestones.title: i18n Coverage
milestones.description: Close out i18n gaps across ornn-web — every page, component, and bubbled error surface goes through t() (zh + en parity).

milestones.title: Review · Security
milestones.description: Findings from automated security review — auth, secrets, input validation, SSRF, sandbox

milestones.title: Review · Vulnerability
milestones.description: Findings from automated vulnerability + dependency review — zip handling, regex, env-var, SDK deps

milestones.title: Review · Coding Standards
milestones.description: Findings from automated coding-standards review — TS strictness, conventions, tests, file size

milestones.title: Review · Industry Standards
milestones.description: Findings from automated industry-standard conformance review — RFC 7807, pagination, dist-tags, npm-style integrity

milestones.title: Review · OSS Readiness
milestones.description: Findings from automated OSS-popularity review — docker-compose, demo, examples, marketing, SDK publish
